subject: [PATCH 08/14] sunrpc: add netlink upcall for the auth.unix.ip cache

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: No comments from David Hildenbrand in the thread so far.

2026-03-16.patch_summary: This patch series adds netlink-based cache upcall support for the ip_map (auth.unix.ip) cache, including new attributes and operations in the sunrpc_cache YAML spec, and updates to the net/sunrpc/netlink.c and net/sunrpc/svcauth_unix.c files.
